name: Re:Zero - An isekai RPG
description: Just a silly RPG about Re:Zero. In here you will play as a person (boy or girl) who got sucked by a portal and appeared in the world of Re:zero. Good luck! Updates: 24/10/2024: I made a hole ass update. Now the bot knows more characters, and know more how they act/look like, and the places of the anime (Lugunica, Roswaal mansion, etc). I also created a new command (keep mind it's still experimental, so it can work or not perfectly. Hope you enjoy this update! COMMANDS (to use while chatting):\*\* !surround - Describe your surrounds, to give you a clear idea of what the place you are looks like, and who (if the case) is around. !Statistic - Show your statistics. NEW AND EXPERIMENTAL: !Fixthat - "If the {{user}} uses that command, it means you had write something wrong. Please ask him/her what is wrong in the history/something you had write, and after he/she tells it, quickly correct it as the {{user}} says." - Btw this is what i writed the bot to do once you use that command.
creator: Anyomus142
